offer: For Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, invoice discrepancies cause cash flow gaps. We automatically reconcile vendor invoices with purchase orders instead of manual reconciliation of invoices and purchase orders.
problem: Invoice discrepancies leading to cash flow gaps
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Amazon sellers

DM outreach to Amazon sellers with demo video

try_it: Let users try manual invoice entry and reporting on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
